overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a character in a cowboy hat walking through a historic 19th-century city at night. The character moves from a narrow covered alley onto wet cobblestone streets illuminated by warm gas lamps, passing historic brick buildings, churches, and gardens.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow covered alley with wooden ceiling

events.description: character approaches and reaches the stone archway exit of the covered corridor

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow covered corridor toward a lit archway exit

entered.detail: wooden plank ceiling with exposed beams running the length of the narrow alley
illuminated red spherical lantern hanging from the ceiling at the archway entrance
stone archway marking the exit from the covered corridor to the outside
structural wooden support beams lining the ceiling of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, dimly lit covered corridor with wooden ceiling beams and walls. A red paper lantern hangs at the far end, illuminating a stone archway that marks the exit to the outside world.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk adjacent to historic church and street

events.description: exits the narrow corridor onto a covered sidewalk with wooden columns
horse-drawn carriage passes by on the street from right to left

agents.ego_description: walking along a covered boardwalk, passing wooden columns and observing the street

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage moving along the cobblestone street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: wooden overhang providing shelter over the sidewalk supported by red wooden posts
large gothic-style stone church with arched windows and iron fence
cast iron street lamp with warm yellow glow illuminating the wet cobblestones
wet reflective cobblestone road surface glistening under the gas lamps

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the corridor onto a covered wooden sidewalk beside a historic street. A large stone church with an iron fence stands to the right, while a horse-drawn carriage passes by on the wet cobblestone road. Gas lamps cast warm light on the reflective ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: open historic street approaching a large mansion

events.description: moves from covered sidewalk to fully open street with clear sky visibility
passes by pedestrians standing on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking down the open cobblestone street toward a large illuminated mansion

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians in period clothing standing and conversing on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large three-story brick building with white trim, balconies, and illuminated windows
black wrought iron fence surrounding the mansion property

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an open cobblestone street toward a grand brick mansion with illuminated windows. The sky is fully visible above, and pedestrians in period clothing stand conversing on the left sidewalk. A wrought iron fence borders the mansion grounds.

scene_state.functional_zone: mansion garden courtyard with tree and flower beds

events.description: enters the garden courtyard through the wrought iron gate
turns slightly left to follow the garden path around the large tree

agents.ego_description: walking through the mansion garden courtyard, following the paved path

entered.detail: brick paved walkway winding through the mansion garden
large mature tree with drooping branches in the center of the garden
red flowering plants and shrubs lining the garden path

segments.scene_description: The character enters a tranquil garden courtyard through a wrought iron gate, following a brick path lined with flower beds. A large willow tree dominates the garden center, while the mansion remains visible in the background. The area is enclosed and private compared to the open street.

scene_state.functional_zone: open street intersection in historic district

events.description: exits the garden courtyard back onto the open cobblestone street
horse rider passes by in the distance at the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking through an open intersection area, navigating around street obstacles

notable_agents.action: wooden wagon with red wheels parked on the side of the street

entered.detail: multi-story historic building at the street corner with balconies and lit windows
green wooden wagon with red wheels parked on the cobblestones

segments.scene_description: The character returns to the open cobblestone streets, navigating through a wider intersection area. Historic buildings line the streets, and a wooden wagon sits parked to the left. The area is more open and exposed compared to the garden, with multiple street directions visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial street with storefront awnings

events.description: enters a narrower commercial street with covered sidewalks and storefronts
passes close by pedestrians standing against the building wall

agents.ego_description: walking along a narrow commercial sidewalk, passing storefronts and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: two men leaning against the brick wall outside a storefront

entered.detail: fabric awning extending over the sidewalk providing shelter
painted signs on the brick wall advertising medicines and prescriptions
wooden benches and sacks stacked against the building wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrower commercial street with covered sidewalks and brick storefronts. Signs for a pharmacy are visible on the right wall where pedestrians stand conversing. The space is more enclosed with awnings overhead, creating an intimate alley-like atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a historic 19th-century city, transitioning from a claustrophobic covered corridor into open, lamp-lit streets and private gardens before returning to a dense commercial district. It begins in a dimly lit wooden corridor, moving toward a red paper lantern and a stone archway that leads outside. As the character emerges onto a covered wooden sidewalk, the scene opens up to reveal a stone church and a horse-drawn carriage passing over wet, reflective cobblestones illuminated by warm gas lamps. The camera then follows the character past pedestrians and a grand brick mansion, slipping through a wrought iron gate into a tranquil garden courtyard centered around a large willow tree. Finally, the view expands back into a wide intersection with parked wagons before narrowing once more into a commercial street lined with brick storefronts and pharmacy signs under low awnings.
